ddls:
CREATE TABLE "vehicles" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the vehicle */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the vehicle */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the vehicle */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the vehicle */,
  "km" TEXT /* Kilometers driven by the vehicle */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year of manufacture of the vehicle */,
  "transmission" TEXT /* Type of transmission (e.g., Automatic, Manual) */,
  "eng_power" TEXT /* Engine power in kW and hp */,
  "eng_capacity" TEXT /* Engine capacity in ccm */,
  "fuel_type" TEXT /* Type of fuel used (e.g., Petrol, Diesel) */,
  "consumption" TEXT /* Fuel consumption in l/100km or drive type (e.g., 4x4, 4x2) */,
  "drive_type" TEXT /* Drive type (e.g., 4x4, 4x2) */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the vehicle is stored */,
  "insertdate" TEXT /* Date the vehicle was added to the inventory */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the vehicle (e.g., In Stock, Sold, Reserved) */,
  "vin" TEXT /* Vehicle Identification Number */,
  "features" TEXT /* Additional features of the vehicle */,
  "warranty_expiration" TEXT /* Expiration date of the vehicle's warranty */,
  "last_service_date" TEXT /* Date of the last service performed on the vehicle */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Condition of the vehicle (e.g., New, Used, Certified Pre-Owned) */,
  "availability" TEXT /* Availability status (e.g., In Stock, On Order, Sold) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the location */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the location */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the location */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who manages the location */,
  "opening_hours" TEXT /* Store opening hours */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_locations_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the customer */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the customer */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the customer */,
  "signup_date" TEXT /* Date the customer signed up */,
  "preferred_contact_method" TEXT /* How the customer prefers to be contacted */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes about the customer */,
  "loyalty_points" INTEGER /* Loyalty points earned by the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales transaction */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle sold */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who purchased the vehicle */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date the sale was completed */,
  "sale_price" TEXT /* Price at which the vehicle was sold */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used (e.g., Cash, Credit Card, Bank Transfer) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the transaction (e.g., Completed, Pending, Canceled) */,
  "discount" TEXT /* Any discount applied to the sale */,
  "finance_option" TEXT /* Financing option chosen by the customer */,
  "sales_rep_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sales representative who handled the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_transactions_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_transactions_sales_rep_id FOREIGN KEY ("sales_rep_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_transactions_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Sales Representative, Manager, Admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., Received, Moved, Sold) */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Location of the vehicle during the event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who recorded the event */,
  "previous_location_id" INTEGER /* Previous location of the vehicle before the event */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_history_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_history_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle the image belongs to */,
  "image_path" TEXT /* File path to the image */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the image was uploaded */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the image */,
  "image_type" TEXT /* Type of image (e.g., Exterior, Interior, Engine) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_images_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inquiries" (
  "inquiry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inquiry */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the inquiry */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle the inquiry is about */,
  "inquiry_date" TEXT /* Date the inquiry was made */,
  "inquiry_details" TEXT /* Details of the inquiry */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the inquiry (e.g., Open, Closed, Follow-Up) */,
  "response_date" TEXT /* Date the inquiry was responded to */,
  "handled_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who handled the inquiry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inquiry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inquiries_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inquiries_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inquiries_handled_by FOREIGN KEY ("handled_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
